name: Mud School
description:
You are in the Wardome Mud School.
You will now learn how to play this nice mud. We,
from the wardome staff, hopes that you enjoy this mud.
&CIf you want to learn how to play in english type 'E or East'.&n
&GSe vc quiser aprender a jogar em portugues tecle 'W ou West'.&n
&w &n
&RNota&W: O MUD eh inteiramente em ingles, feita a excessao dessa zone.
Somente essa zona de aprendizado eh escrita em 2 linguas.
